verdict.rationale: This reads reactive and blamey. Sending it now will probably trigger defensiveness and turn into a fight.

coaching_question: What outcome are you actually going for here — connection, clarity, or a reaction?

rewrites.text: Hey. I’m still upset about earlier. Can we talk when you’ve got a minute? I want to understand your side.
I’ve cooled down a bit. I’m more hurt than angry. Can we reset and talk properly?
